column1: # Secret-scan allowlist. Tab-separated: value <TAB> path <TAB> reason
# A finding is suppressed ONLY when BOTH the exact literal value AND the exact
# repo-relative path match a row here. Never path-only (would blind the scan to a
# real key added to that file later); never value-only; never a substring rule.
# Note: the blocking secret patterns in strip_and_scan.py use REAL credential
# lengths, so most of this repo's intentional test fakes (deliberately short /
# match at all and need no entry. List here only fakes that happen to match a
# blocking shape, so the gate stays quiet on a clean release.
